title: FAILED TEST #024
content: Context collapse in 200+ turn conversation — 超长对话中出现上下文丢失，模型开始重复之前的回复。

title: FAILED TEST #021
content: Memory overflow in Persona #7 — 14h continuous run exceeded memory limit, persona sync failed.

title: FAILED TEST #018
content: Persona sync timeout — Agent-3 同步失败，已自动重试 3 次后恢复。

title: FAILED TEST #019
content: Hermes 长时间运行后出现自我叙述循环 — 连续 14h 后出现循环，重现率高，需要加入跳出机制。

title: FAILED TEST #015
content: DRIFT DETECTED — Hermes prompt injection response anomaly, 防御机制出现异常。

title: FAILED TEST #012
content: SIGNAL LOST — Agent-5 heartbeat timeout, network jitter caused sync failure.

title: FAILED TEST #009
content: Persona #3 记忆残留 — 切换人格后出现前一个人格的记忆碎片，需要更彻底的清理机制。

title: FAILED TEST #006
content: Context window overflow — GPT-5 在超长对话中出现信息丢失，需要优化上下文管理策略。
